attributes.Sql Query:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '60' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES)

SELECT
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.REFRESH_DATETIME,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PARTY_SITE_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PARTY_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.LOCATION_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PARTY_SITE_NUMBER,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.CREATION_DATE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.CREATED_BY,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.REQUEST_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PROGRAM_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.WH_UPDATE_DATE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE16,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE17,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE18,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE19,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ATTRIBUTE20,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE1,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE2,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE4,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE5,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE6,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE7,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE8,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE9,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE10,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE11,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE12,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE16,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE17,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE18,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE19,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE20,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ORIG_SYSTEM_REFERENCE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.START_DATE_ACTIVE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.END_DATE_ACTIVE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.REGION,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.MAILSTOP,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.CUSTOMER_KEY_OSM,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PHONE_KEY_OSM,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.CONTACT_KEY_OSM,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.IDENTIFYING_ADDRESS_FLAG,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.LANGUAGE_1,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.STATUS,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PARTY_SITE_NAME,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ADDRESSEE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.CREATED_BY_MODULE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.APPLICATION_ID,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.ACTUAL_CONTENT_SOURCE,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.GLOBAL_LOCATION_NUMBER,
STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.DUNS_NUMBER_C

From
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES,
(
select PARTY_SITE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from 
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES
minus
select PARTY_SITE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from
$$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_CSI_IEA_VALUES
) ACM
Where
ACM.PARTY_SITE_ID=STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PARTY_SITE_ID and
ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_HZ_PARTY_SITES.REFRESH_DATETIME
